steps.title: Move from general to exact
steps.content: The first sentence says Life Without Buildings chose its name as a tribute to another band. The second sentence gives the exact tribute: the song and the band that inspired the name.

steps.title: Use a specifying transition
steps.content: A signals that something is true despite another fact. B signals the end of a sequence, and C signals substitution or contrast. The needed transition narrows the general tribute claim to its specific source. The answer is D.
